Est. 2009 · Dubai

2009

A studio built on
trust, time
& transformation

What started as a singular passion for turning empty spaces into extraordinary environments has grown, over fifteen years, into one of Dubai's most trusted interior design and fit-out studios. We don't just design rooms — we craft experiences that our clients live and work in every single day.

Every project carries the weight of our reputation — earned project by project, client by client, since 2009. Our team of seasoned designers, project managers, and craftspeople brings depth that only genuine UAE market experience provides.

Mr. Supreet, Managing Director
Creating beautiful spaces since 2009
15
Years crafting
Dubai's finest interiors

Featured Project

The Cove

Creek Harbour, Dubai

Residential lobby and common area fit-out across three towers at Dubai's landmark Creek Harbour waterfront development.

View Project 3 Towers · 2024

Featured Project

Al Zorah

Golf Club & Clubhouse, Ajman

Full hospitality interior fit-out of the Al Zorah Golf Clubhouse — lobby, restaurant, bar, pro shop, and changing facilities.

A decade and a half
building Dubai's interiors

Start a Project
2009
Founded

Spaceó Interiors opens in Dubai with a vision to redefine interior fit-out across the UAE.

2012
First Major Commercial

Secured first large-scale commercial contract, establishing our reputation for precision delivery.

2015
100 Projects Milestone

Celebrated 100 completed projects spanning residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors.

2018
Hospitality Expansion

Expanded into luxury hospitality — hotels, restaurants, and F&B concepts across Dubai.

2021
300+ Projects Delivered

Crossed 300 projects with a growing team of specialist designers and fit-out professionals.

2024
80+ & Counting

Recognised as one of Dubai's most experienced interior studios. 80+ landmark spaces delivered.

A proven process
refined over 15 years

Every project follows a clear, accountable path — from the first conversation to the final handover. No surprises, no shortcuts, no compromises on quality.

01
Consultation

We listen first. Your vision, requirements, and budget guide everything that follows.

02
Concept Design

Initial concepts, mood boards, and material palettes tailored to your brief.

03
Planning

Detailed drawings, approvals, procurement plans, and project scheduling.

04
Execution

On-site delivery with quality control at every stage — structure to final finishes.

05
Handover

Full walkthrough, snagging, and a space truly ready for you to move into.
